Class AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilderImpl<SELF extends AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF>>

java.lang.Object
net.replaceitem.reconfigure.config.widget.builder.WidgetBuilderImpl<SELF,String>

All Implemented Interfaces:
AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF>, WidgetBuilder<SELF,String>
Direct Known Subclasses:
EditBoxWidgetBuilderImpl, TextFieldWidgetBuilderImpl
public abstract class AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilderImpl<SELF extends AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF>> extends WidgetBuilderImpl<SELF,String> implements AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF>

  • Method Details

    • placeholder

      public SELF placeholder(net.minecraft.network.chat.Component placeholder)
      Description copied from interface: AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder
      Sets the placeholder text for the text field widget. The placeholder is shown in the text field in gray when it is empty.
      Specified by:
      placeholder in interface AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF extends AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF>>
      Parameters:
      placeholder - The placeholder text
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining

    • placeholder

      public SELF placeholder()
      Description copied from interface: AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder
      Sets the placeholder for the text field widget to the default translatable text. The translation key will be reconfigure.property.[namespace].[propertyname].placeholder. The placeholder is shown in the text field in gray when it is empty.
      Specified by:
      placeholder in interface AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF extends AbstractTextFieldWidgetBuilder<SELF>>
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining
